summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgroYousfi Arabic e-commerce store. Backend APIs fully functional (23/23 tests passed). Frontend Arabic RTL layout, shopping flow, authentication, and cart functionality working excellently. Minor issues with featured products display and language switching UI.

ui_bugs.issue: Featured products section shows 0 items despite products being available

design_issues.issue: Language selector exists in code but not visible in UI, French/English content not fully implemented

passed_tests: Home page hero section with Arabic content
Categories display with 6 categories and icons
Products page with search and filtering
Cart page showing items correctly with Arabic text
Login page with OTP flow (demo code: 317467)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix featured products display on home page and implement visible language switching UI for French/English support
